title: JNVST XI Class (Lateral Entry) 2025 Last Date Extended

detail.short_info: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti (NVS) has conducting JNVST XI Class (Lateral Entry) 2025. Candidates with 10th Class can Apply Online

content.text: Name of the Post: JNVST XI Class (Lateral Entry) 2025 Online Form

Brief Information: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti (NVS) has given a notification for Conducting the Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Selection Test (JNVST 2025) for XI Class Lateral Entry admission for Lateral Entry Selection Test in 2025-26. Those Candidates who are interested in the admission details & completed all eligibility criteria can read the Notification & Apply Online.

items.label: Important Dates
items.text: Last Date to Apply Online: 26-11-2024 Date for Online Window Correction : 27 & 28-11-2024 Date of Exam: February 08, 2025 Downloading of Admit Card: Will be Communicated Later. Declaration of result: May/June, 2025.

items.label: Age Limit
items.text: Candidates Born between 1st June 2008 to 31st July 2010 (both days inclusive).

items.label: Qualification
items.text: Candidates Should Possess 10th Class during the session 2024-25 only are eligible to apply.

items.label: JNVST XI Class Lateral Entry Admission 2025

seo_tags: JNVST XI Class (Lateral Entry) 2025 - Apply Online for Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Selection Test
